title: M365 Authoritative Persona Department Pack Rebase v1
notes: H4S records the seven preflight department-pack mismatches that blocked H4 after H3.
All ten department packs now reconcile to the staged H3 department totals, active counts, and registry-backed counts.
Every promoted persona remains persona-contract-only with zero supported actions inside the rebased pack authority surface.
Deterministic replay produces an identical aggregate verification hash across repeated reconciliation.
